description_long: This is a single right-handed armored glove featuring a dark, textured base material that appears to be reinforced with metallic plates. The glove extends from the fingers to the mid-forearm, with a prominent bronze-colored bracer section adorned with intricate engravings and secured by two visible buckles. The main body of the glove is a deep, matte blue-gray, decorated with lighter geometric linework and subtle patterns. The metallic bracer curves outward at the forearm, providing additional protection and a distinctive silhouette. The fingers are fully enclosed, and the glove's surface shows a mix of hard, protective elements and flexible, fitted areas for dexterity. This glove would be suitable for use in urban fantasy or historical settings, offering both style and defense.
description: A dark, armored glove with a bronze-engraved bracer and geometric patterns, extending from the fingers to the mid-forearm. It combines hard metallic protection with flexible, fitted material for dexterity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the glove, highlighting the bronze bracer and engraved details along the forearm.
description_view_1: Angled view from the back of the hand, emphasizing the rounded, protective bracer and the buckles securing it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric linework on the glove and the full coverage of the fingers.
description_view_3: View from the open end of the bracer, showing the interior space and the outward flare of the metallic section.
